release_notes.title: Industry Templates, Smart Categories, Keyboard Shortcuts & Bulk Actions
release_notes.summary: 6 polish features: one-click industry setup (Consulting/E-commerce/SaaS/Restaurant), auto-categorize from your history, full keyboard shortcuts, bulk-select with undo, PWA shortcuts + Share Target, and a clear-sample-data button.

changes.text: Industry templates: pick Consulting, E-commerce, SaaS, Restaurant, or Generic on first run to get a tailored set of revenue + expense categories. Templates merge with existing categories — your data is never overwritten.

Auto-categorize from history: when you type a description that resembles a previous one, the app suggests the matching category with a one-tap 'Use this' button. Uses exact match, substring, then token overlap scoring.
Keyboard shortcuts: press ? anywhere to see the cheat sheet. n = new transaction, / = focus search, g+d/r/e/b/s/i/t/m = jump to view, Esc = close any dialog. Disabled while typing.
Bulk actions on Revenue and Expense: checkbox per row + select-all-on-page header. Floating action bar shows selection count; bulk delete uses the same 6-second Undo pattern as single deletes.
PWA shortcuts: long-press the app icon on Android/Chrome OS to see Add Transaction, Import CSV, and Dashboard quick actions.
Share Target API: 'Share to P&L Dashboard' now appears in your phone's share sheet for CSV and Excel files. Sharing routes to the import view ready for mapping.
Sample Data is now tagged so you can clear it in one click — the Dashboard shows a 'Clear Sample Data' button whenever demo transactions are loaded.

release_notes.title: Power Features — Undo, Search, Duplicates, Workers & Optimistic Sync
release_notes.summary: 5 high-impact upgrades adapted from Linear, Gmail, Stripe: undo any delete, instant search on Revenue/Expense, non-blocking CSV import via Web Worker, automatic duplicate detection on import, and live sync status indicators.

changes.text: Undo deletes: deleting a transaction now shows a 6-second 'Undo' toast (Linear/Gmail pattern).
Instant inline search on Revenue and Expense tabs — debounced 150ms.
Pagination Prev/Next controls now visible on Revenue and Expense tables.
Non-blocking CSV import via Web Worker for files >500KB.
Automatic duplicate detection on CSV import.
Optimistic UI for Google Drive sync with live status indicators.
CSP updated to allow blob: workers.

release_notes.title: CX Polish — Help, Install Prompt, Plain-Language Backup & Empty States
release_notes.summary: 7 usability improvements: smart CSV import, actionable empty states, help drawer, smart install prompt, plain-English backup labels, canonical URL.

changes.text: CSV import: date format and number format selectors.
Empty state CTAs on Dashboard, Revenue, Expense.
Sample Data demo mode.
In-app Help drawer with Quick Start and FAQs.
Smart PWA install banner after 3+ transactions.
Backup tab labels in plain English.
Canonical URL meta tag added.
